description: Manus is an AI agent platform that lets users run multi-step tasks, workflows, and tool-connected automations. It also supports integrations with third-party services and custom MCP servers.
summary: Manus exposes a REST Manus API at `https://api.manus.ai` authenticated by either a Manus API key or Open App OAuth2 bearer token, plus a remote MCP server at `https://mcp.manus.im/mcp` using OAuth.
